name: Mobile viewport shows a bottom nav bar and hides the sidebar
description: On a narrow mobile viewport the desktop left sidebar is hidden and a fixed bottom navigation bar appears, presenting its primary destinations (Home, Review, Feynman, Research) plus a More button as a single horizontal row of tap targets pinned to the bottom edge. Tapping a tab navigates.

planSteps.description: Resize the browser to a narrow mobile viewport about 390 pixels wide
Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it so the bottom of the screen is unobstructed

Verify the desktop left sidebar is NOT visible at this width, and instead a navigation bar is pinned to the bottom edge of the screen containing tab items labeled Home, Review, Feynman, Research and a More button, arranged side-by-side in one horizontal row
Tap the Review item in the bottom navigation bar
Verify the app navigates to the Review view (the review page content or heading is shown), confirming the bottom-nav items are working links and not just decorative icons
